creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Kouichiro Iwao <meta@club.kyutech.ac.jp> -----

From: Kouichiro Iwao <meta@club.kyutech.ac.jp>
To: pav@FreeBSD.org
Cc: freebsd-ports-bugs@FreeBSD.org
Subject: Re: ports/133858: net/freenx: nxagent dumps core on FreeBSD 7.*

With nxserver-2.1.0_3, freenx & nxserver are perfectly working.
It seems that the problem has fixed.

On Mon, May 04, 2009 at 06:54:37PM +0000, pav@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: net/freenx: nxagent dumps core on FreeBSD 7.*
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: pav
> State-Changed-When: Mon May 4 18:53:25 UTC 2009
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Can you try again with nxserver-2.1.0_3 ?
> 
> 
> Responsible-Changed-From-To: freebsd-ports-bugs->pav

> Responsible-Changed-Why:

Iwao, Koichiro <meta@club.kyutech.ac.jp>
